summary: Mobile responsiveness testing for Job Card modal and EFI panel - All 10 test cases PASSED

tests.test: EFI hidden by default on mobile
EFI panel full width on mobile
EFI visible by default on desktop

tests.details: Desktop table visible at md breakpoint
Button shows 'Hide EFI' at md breakpoint

features_verified: Job Card modal opens fullscreen on mobile (390x844 viewport) - PASS
Job Card content and EFI panel stack vertically (flex-col) on mobile - PASS
EFI panel is hidden by default on mobile viewport (<768px) - PASS
Clicking 'Show EFI' reveals EFI panel stacked below job card content - PASS
EFI panel takes full width on mobile (w-full) - PASS
On desktop viewport (1920x800), Job Card and EFI panel are side-by-side (flex-row) - PASS
On desktop, EFI panel is visible by default and has fixed width ~420px - PASS
Dialog is fullscreen (w-full h-full) on mobile, max-w-[95vw] on desktop - PASS
EstimateItemsPanel table is wrapped in overflow-x-auto div - PASS
Customer & Vehicle Details grid is single column on mobile, 2 columns on desktop - PASS

JobCard.jsx.line_77: efiPanelOpen state correctly initialized with window.innerWidth >= 768
JobCard.jsx.line_534: Main container uses flex-col md:flex-row correctly
JobCard.jsx.line_900: EFI panel div uses w-full md:w-[420px] border-t md:border-t-0 md:border-l correctly

Tickets.jsx.line_591: DialogContent uses w-full h-full max-w-full max-h-full md:max-w-[95vw] md:max-h-[90vh] correctly

EstimateItemsPanel.jsx.line_1021: Table wrapped in overflow-x-auto div correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile responsiveness for Job Card modal and EFI panel fully implemented and verified. All breakpoints (390px mobile, 767px below-tablet, 768px tablet, 1920px desktop) tested and working correctly.
console_errors: Minor: DataCloneError on estimate ensure - does not affect functionality
